social.text:
Be like El Salvador🇸🇻

拥有638万人口的国家萨尔瓦多，90%是印第安人与西班牙人混血后裔。我想，是不是萨尔瓦多的人民大多数都有常识智商够高并有远见，2019年选出了这么好的年轻有为的总统Nayib Bukele，带领国家一步步回归法律秩序，稳定繁荣。

如果萨尔瓦多人民可以做到，为什么我们澳洲人民不可以？

如果你有常识、智商不低、眼光放长远，请选择一国党。


Nayib Bukele (@nayibbukele)

The next step is to go from being a safe country to beco

social.text:

That’s what our Great British Summer Savings package is all about.

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
Ahead of the Shavuot holiday, the Prime Minister's Office (PMO) Conversion Authority held a national convert conference this week in the Old City of Jerusalem, under the banner "An Eternal Nation - One Nation."

The conference, held in the presence of the Sephardic Chief Rabbi of

social.text:
